overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a bustling cyberpunk street market with industrial metal roofing and vibrant neon lighting. The camera moves through an outdoor seating area with red plastic chairs and a green food kiosk, then approaches a cooking station where a vendor prepares noodles in a large wok.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered food court seating area with neon-lit stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the market seating area toward the green food kiosk

notable_agents.action: large man in white tank top and red pants sitting on red plastic chair
server with cybernetic arm clearing dishes from metal table

entered.detail: green food ordering kiosk with BURRITO X-tra signage and illuminated menu display
industrial metal framework roof with skylights allowing diffused natural light
bright red plastic chairs arranged around metal dining tables
red and orange neon tube lights illuminating the stall canopy

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered cyberpunk market with industrial metal roofing and neon lighting. The camera walks forward past patrons seated on red plastic chairs, approaching a green food kiosk. A server with a cybernetic arm clears dishes while a large man in a white tank top sits prominently in the foreground.

scene_state.functional_zone: dining area with scattered patrons and standing guard

events.description: camera turns left while moving past the seated patrons, heading toward the cooking area

agents.ego_description: navigating between dining tables and moving deeper into the market space

notable_agents.action: man in green jacket with cybernetic hand drinking from a cup
armed guard in tactical gear with mask standing with arms crossed

entered.detail: stacks of white ceramic bowls on a metal serving counter
illuminated digital display showing food menu items
metal tables with red chairs where patrons are seated

segments.scene_description: Moving past the initial seating area, the camera turns left and navigates through dining tables where patrons eat and drink. A man in a green jacket with a cybernetic hand sips from a cup in the foreground, while an armed guard stands watch in the background. Stacks of white bowls sit on a counter to the left as the space transitions toward the food preparation area.

scene_state.functional_zone: food preparation cooking station with wok

events.description: enters the darker enclosed cooking station behind the serving counter

agents.ego_description: standing at the cooking station watching the food preparation process

notable_agents.action: cook wearing conical hat and mask stirring noodles in a large wok with a spatula

entered.detail: large round cooking wok filled with noodles and vegetables over a heat source
metal food preparation counter with cooking utensils and stacked plates
steam rising from the hot wok during the cooking process

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a darker, more enclosed cooking station where a vendor wearing a conical hat prepares food in a large metal wok. Steam rises from the noodles as the cook stirs them with a spatula. The space is tighter and more industrial than the open seating area, with metal counters and cooking equipment surrounding the workspace.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant cyberpunk market that transitions from an open seating area into a cramped, industrial cooking station. It begins under industrial metal roofing and neon lights, gliding past patrons on red plastic chairs and a server with a cybernetic arm near a green food kiosk. As the camera turns left, the scene shifts through a crowded dining area where a man with a cybernetic hand sips a drink while an armed guard watches from the background. The space then narrows and darkens as the camera moves past stacks of white bowls and enters a tight food preparation zone. Finally, the movement culminates at a metal counter where a vendor in a conical hat stirs steaming noodles in a large wok.
